chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C. P. No. D – 3271 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge Direction 1.For order on CMA No.17845/20 (stay) 2.For order as to maintainability of petition 15.02.2021 Mr. Muhammad Daud Narejo, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent No.3 Mr. Nishat Warsi, DAG --------- The petitioner has impugned the transfer and absorption of respondent No.3 from province of Baluchistan to Wafaqi Ombudsmen. Mr. Metlo, learned counsel for respondent No.3, has relied upon Rule 14 of Wafaqi Mohtasib Secretariat Officers Service Rules 2009 whereby appointment by transfer from a post to another post may be made in the public interest. On a query of the Court, Mr. Metlo submits that it was on account of public interest that transfer was ordered. He relied upon stability of Baluchistan, wedlock policy and application for transfer of respondent No.3 and absorption and quota. We are not impressed by these submissions as these are not framed in the public interest and relates to personal interest of an individual which may have convinced an authority for transfer and or absorption of respondent No.3. However, at the request of Mr. Metlo, we adjourn this matter to 24.02.2021 to be taken up in the second half. This matter is treated as part-heard. J U D G E J U D G E Ashraf
